'''Snayd''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] and a member of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. He served as an aide to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]].

{{Char-stub}}
